name: Cell Counting (Hemocytometer)

components.name: 1. 胰酶消化 → 制备单细胞悬液
2. 取 10 µL 细胞悬液 + 10 µL 台盼蓝 (1:1)
components.note: 稀释因子 = 2; 密度过高再稀释

components.name: 3. 加盖玻片到血球计数板
components.note: 盖玻片两侧出现牛顿环

components.name: 4. 加 10 µL 混合液到计数室
components.note: 毛细作用自动填充, 勿溢出

components.name: 5. 10× 镜下计数四个大方格
components.note: 活细胞透明; 死细胞蓝色

components.name: 6. 计算浓度
components.note: cells/mL = (四格总数 / 4) × 稀释因子 × 10⁴

components.name: 7. 计算活率
components.note: Viability = 活细胞数 / 总细胞数 × 100%

notes.en: Trypan blue contact ≤5 min (otherwise live cells also stain). Ideal count: 100-200 cells per large square. Cells on grid lines: count top and left, not bottom and right. Clean hemocytometer with 70% ethanol; do not sonicate. Automated counters (Countess, TC20) are more accurate but need calibration.
notes.zh: 台盼蓝接触时间 ≤5 min（否则活细胞也会着色）。每格理想计数 100–200 个细胞。计数线上细胞：计上不计下，计左不计右。清洗计数板：70% 乙醇擦拭，勿用超声。自动计数仪（Countess, TC20）更准确但需校准。

ref: Freshney (2016) Culture of Animal Cells, 7th Ed, Ch. 21; Louis & Siegel (2011) Curr Protoc Microbiol

briefSteps.en: Prepare single-cell suspension → mix 1:1 with 0.4% trypan blue → load hemocytometer → count cells in 4 large squares at 10× → calculate concentration and viability
briefSteps.zh: 制备单细胞悬液 → 与 0.4% 台盼蓝 1:1 混合 → 加入血球计数板 → 10× 镜下计数四个大方格 → 计算浓度和活力

detailedSteps.en: Prepare a single-cell suspension by trypsinization or gentle pipetting; resuspend in complete medium and ensure no clumps.
detailedSteps.zh: 通过胰酶消化或轻柔吹打制备单细胞悬液，用完全培养基重悬，确认无细胞团块。

detailedSteps.en: Clean the hemocytometer and coverslip with 70% ethanol and lint-free tissue; let dry completely.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 70% 乙醇和无尘纸擦拭血球计数板和盖玻片，完全晾干。

detailedSteps.en: Place the coverslip on the hemocytometer; press gently until Newton's rings (rainbow interference fringes) appear at the edges.
detailedSteps.zh: 将盖玻片放置在计数板上，轻压直至两侧出现牛顿环（彩色干涉条纹）。

detailedSteps.en: In a microcentrifuge tube, mix 10 µL cell suspension with 10 µL of 0.4% trypan blue (1:1 dilution factor = 2); incubate at room temperature for 1–2 min (do not exceed 3 min).
detailedSteps.zh: 在微量离心管中将 10 µL 细胞悬液与 10 µL 0.4% 台盼蓝 1:1 混合（稀释因子 = 2），室温孵育 1–2 min（不超过 3 min）。

detailedSteps.en: Pipette 10 µL of the trypan blue–cell mixture at the edge of the coverslip; allow capillary action to fill the counting chamber without overflow.
detailedSteps.zh: 取 10 µL 台盼蓝-细胞混合液在盖玻片边缘加样，毛细管作用自动填充计数室，勿溢出。

detailedSteps.en: Under 10× objective, count all cells (live = clear/unstained; dead = blue) in each of the 4 large corner squares. Count cells on the top and left boundary lines; exclude cells on the bottom and right lines.
detailedSteps.zh: 在 10× 物镜下，计数四个角大方格中的所有细胞（活细胞：透明/不着色；死细胞：蓝色）。计上边和左边压线细胞，不计下边和右边压线细胞。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate cell concentration: cells/mL = (total cells in 4 squares ÷ 4) × dilution factor × 10⁴.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算细胞浓度：细胞数/mL = （四格总细胞数 ÷ 4）× 稀释因子 × 10⁴。

detailedSteps.en: Calculate cell viability: viability (%) = (live cell count ÷ total cell count) × 100. Viability should be ≥90% for healthy cultures.
detailedSteps.zh: 计算细胞活率（%）= 活细胞数 ÷ 总细胞数 × 100。健康细胞活力应 ≥90%。

detailedSteps.en: Clean the hemocytometer with 70% ethanol and a lint-free tissue after use; do not use sonication.
detailedSteps.zh: 用后用 70% 乙醇和无尘纸清洁计数板，勿用超声清洗。

note.en: Cell suspension can be kept at RT for a short time before mixing with trypan blue; do not exceed 30 min to maintain viability accuracy
note.zh: 细胞悬液混合台盼蓝前可短暂室温放置；不超过 30 min 以保证活力计数准确

usage.en: Count cells and assess viability using a hemocytometer with trypan blue exclusion.
usage.zh: 使用血球计数板和台盼蓝排斥法计数细胞并评估活力。
